---
title: "Scenario"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-04"
---
## Scenario Exercise — Leading to Final Recommendation

We construct four contrasted scenarios over 2025–2027, combining 
the key uncertainty factors identified in the signpost monitoring.

```{r scenarios, fig.width=11, fig.height=6}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(gt)
library(here)

# --- Scenario parameters ---
scenarios <- list(
  "S1: Baseline\n(stable)" = list(
    base_growth  = 0.035,
    mobil_rate   = 0.25,
    dgf_shock    = 0,
    label        = "Stable macro, no reform"
  ),
  "S2: Cadastral\nreform" = list(
    base_growth  = 0.08,
    mobil_rate   = 0.25,
    dgf_shock    = 0,
    label        = "Cadastral revaluation enacted (+8% base)"
  ),
  "S3: Housing\ndownturn" = list(
    base_growth  = 0.01,
    mobil_rate   = 0.10,
    dgf_shock    = -0.03,
    label        = "Price decline, DGF cut, low mobilisation"
  ),
  "S4: Budget\npressure" = list(
    base_growth  = 0.025,
    mobil_rate   = 0.15,
    dgf_shock    = -0.05,
    label        = "DGF cut -5%, moderate base growth"
  )
)

# --- Strategy parameters ---
strategies <- list(
  "Rate +2pp"              = list(delta_taux = 0.02, mobil_share = 0.0),
  "Vacancy mobilisation"   = list(delta_taux = 0.00, mobil_share = 1.0),
  "Mixed (+1pp + 25%)"     = list(delta_taux = 0.01, mobil_share = 0.5)
)

# Base values
base_2024      <- 1128490752
taux_2024      <- 0.4454
vacants_struct <- 14529
base_per_unit  <- 3229
n_years        <- 3

# --- Simulate ---
results <- expand.grid(
  scenario = names(scenarios),
  strategy = names(strategies),
  year     = 1:n_years
) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    sc = list(scenarios[[scenario]]),
    st = list(strategies[[strategy]]),
    base_t = base_2024 * (1 + sc$base_growth) ^ year,
    extra_base = vacants_struct * sc$mobil_rate * st$mobil_share * base_per_unit,
    taux_t = taux_2024 + st$delta_taux,
    revenue_M = (base_t + extra_base) * taux_t / 1e6,
    actual_year = 2024 + year
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# --- Plot ---
ggplot(results, aes(x = actual_year, y = revenue_M, 
                     color = strategy, linetype = strategy)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 502.9, linetype = "dotted", 
             color = "black", linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~scenario, ncol = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Rate +2pp"            = "#e74c3c",
                                 "Vacancy mobilisation" = "#2980b9",
                                 "Mixed (+1pp + 25%)"   = "#8e44ad")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("Rate +2pp"            = "dashed",
                                    "Vacancy mobilisation" = "solid",
                                    "Mixed (+1pp + 25%)"   = "dotdash")) +
  labs(title = "Projected TFPB revenues by scenario and strategy (2025–2027)",
       subtitle = "Dotted line = 2024 actual revenue (502.9 M€)",
       x = "Year", y = "Revenue (M€)", 
       color = "Strategy", linetype = "Strategy") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
ggsave(here("output", "Projected_TFPB.png"))
```


```{r}
summary_table <- results %>%
  filter(year == 3) %>%
  select(scenario, strategy, revenue_M) %>%
  mutate(revenue_M = round(revenue_M, 1)) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = strategy, values_from = revenue_M)

tab <- summary_table %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    scenario = "Scenario",
    `Rate +2pp` = "Rate +2pp (M€)",
    `Vacancy mobilisation` = "Vacancy mobil. (M€)",
    `Mixed (+1pp + 25%)` = "Mixed (M€)"
  ) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Projected TFPB revenue in Year 3 (2027)",
    subtitle = "By scenario and strategy"
  ) %>%
  cols_align(
    align = "center",
    -scenario
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels(everything())
  )
gtsave(tab, here("output","Scenarios.png"))
tab
```
